top_signals.title: Africa CDC Urges Congo to Pay Striking Ebola Workers
top_signals.summary: Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention is working with the Democratic Republic of Congo to speed up overdue payments to Ebola responders after strikes in the epidemic’s epicenter threatened efforts to contain what officials say is the world’s fastest-growing Ebola outbreak.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UBS Strategists Turn Biggest European Stock Bulls With 8% Upside
top_signals.summary: Stronger earnings and a broadening rally will power European stocks to new highs this year, according to UBS Group AG strategists, who are now the biggest bulls among forecasters tracked by Bloomberg.
